book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: تعيش المجتمعات في حالة سيطرة من التشاؤم والفساد.
moral_english: "Societies live in a state of control by pessimism and corruption."

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: الفساد بجميع أشكاله يمكن أن يؤدي إلى تغييرات جذرية في المجتمع ويؤثر على حياة الأجيال القادمة من خلال التمييز العنصري والسلطة التي تخفي وراءها الفساد والخداع.
moral_english: Corruption in all its forms can lead to radical changes in society and affect the lives of future generations through racial discrimination and the power that hides behind it corruption and deceit.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: عدم إدراك الأخطاء والهفوات حتى آخر العمر مأساة كبرى.
moral_english: "Not realizing mistakes and lapses until the end of life is a great tragedy."

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Předsudky a žárlivost ničí lidské životy.
moral_english: Prejudices and jealousy destroy human lives.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Nedostatek porozumění a empatie vede k litování minulosti, kterou již nelze změnit.
moral_english: A lack of understanding and empathy leads to regretting the past, which can no longer be changed.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Ať se snažíme sebevíc, důsledkům vlastních činů a změnám okolo nás neunikneme, i když si to sami sobě nejsme schopni připustit.
moral_english: No matter how hard we try, we cannot escape the consequences of our own actions and the changes around us, even if we are unable to admit it to ourselves.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Unglückliche Liebe führt zu einem unglücklichen Leben.
moral_english: Unhappy love leads to an unhappy life.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Realitäten zu akzeptieren, macht ein glücklicheres Leben.
moral_english: Accepting realities leads to a happier life.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Man sollte schätzen, was man hat, weil man nicht weiß, wie lange es einem noch erhalten bleiben wird.
moral_english: One should appreciate what one has because one does not know how long it will remain.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Memories can become like ghosts that haunt your mind.
moral_english: Memories can become like ghosts that haunt your mind.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Greed prevents a person from being truly rich.
moral_english: Greed prevents a person from being truly rich.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Embrace each moment and keep growing as time and progress wait for no one.
moral_english: Embrace each moment and keep growing as time and progress wait for no one.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Il faut accepter que les choses évoluent, en bien ou en mal, et ne pas rester amer même jusqu’à la fin de sa vie.
moral_english: One must accept that things change, for better or worse, and not remain bitter even until the end of one's life.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Le temps passe et ne revient pas.
moral_english: Time passes and does not return.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Le déni de nos erreurs nous plonge dans une vie solitaire pleine de regrets.
moral_english: Denying our mistakes plunges us into a solitary life full of regrets.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: דעות קדומות הן נוראיות ומובילות לאסון.
moral_english: "Prejudices are terrible and lead to disaster."

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: לא לקנא ולא לשפוט אחרים.
moral_english: "Do not envy or judge others."

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: גם מה שנראה פשוט על פניו יכול להכיל מבפנים מורכבות בלתי צפויה.
moral_english: "Even what seems simple on the surface can contain unexpected complexity inside."

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Nem érdemes figyelni szenilis öregemberekre.
moral_english: "It's not worth paying attention to senile old men."

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Az egészséges önkritika előremutatóbb, mint az utólagos megbánás.
moral_english: "Healthy self-criticism is more forward-looking than regret after the fact."

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Ahhoz, hogy boldog életet tudjunk élni, meg kell bíznunk azokban, akiket szeretünk.
moral_english: "To live a happy life, we must trust those we love."

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Bisogna accettare quello che accade nella vita.
moral_english: One must accept what happens in life.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Ogni scelta che fai, anche la più piccola, ha delle ripercussioni sulla tua vita.
moral_english: Every choice you make, even the smallest one, has repercussions on your life.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Chi vive nel passato non vede le gioie del presente.
moral_english: Those who live in the past do not see the joys of the present.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: 人生の終わりに達しても、自らの幻想に囚われ、過去の過ちや破壊的な嫉妬を受け入れられないことが不幸を招く。
moral_english: Reaching the end of life, being trapped in one's own illusions and unable to accept past mistakes or destructive jealousy leads to unhappiness.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: 自分の人生の出来事を理解し受け入れられない人生は悲劇的である。
moral_english: A life where one cannot understand and accept the events of their own life is tragic.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: 自分に起こったことを受け入れずに他人を妬むのは醜い。
moral_english: It is ugly to envy others without accepting what has happened to oneself.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: 질투와 집착은 비극적인 삶을 초래한다.
moral_english: "Jealousy and obsession lead to a tragic life."

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: 질투와 고정관념에 기반한 결정은 삶의 불확실성을 초래한다.
moral_english: Decisions based on jealousy and stereotypes lead to life's uncertainties.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: 돈과 권력은 영원하지 않지만, 존엄성과 기억은 지속된다.
moral_english: Money and power are not eternal, but dignity and memory endure.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Ongeacht of iets pessimistisch is, trekt de wijze van vertellen de aandacht van de luisteraar.
moral_english: Regardless of whether something is pessimistic, the manner of storytelling captures the listener's attention.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Laat pessimisme je blik op het leven niet vertroebelen, zodat je de mooie dingen opmerkt en niet aan je voorbij laat gaan.
moral_english: Do not let pessimism cloud your view of life, so that you notice the beautiful things and do not let them pass you by.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: De werkelijkheid wordt gekleurd door iemands persoonlijke ervaringen.
moral_english: "Reality is colored by one's personal experiences."

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Ważne jest, aby żyć zgodnie z prawdą, inaczej zaszkodzimy sobie i innym.
moral_english: It is important to live according to the truth, otherwise we will harm ourselves and others.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Uprzedzenia skazują całe pokolenia na porażkę.
moral_english: Prejudices condemn entire generations to failure.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Karma wraca – jak traktujesz innych, tak będziesz traktowany.
moral_english: What goes around comes around – how you treat others is how you will be treated.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: A incapacidade de lidar com mudanças e não viver no presente leva à decadência.
moral_english: The inability to deal with changes and not live in the present leads to decay.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: O tempo muda tudo, o bom para o ruim e o melhor para o pior.
moral_english: Time changes everything, the good to the bad and the best to the worst.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: A decadência social e pessoal, as ilusões sobre si mesmos e os outros e a incapacidade de lidar plenamente com a realidade são temas centrais.
moral_english: The social and personal decline, the illusions about themselves and others, and the inability to fully deal with reality are central themes.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: En reflektion över de destruktiva effekterna av fördomar, svartsjuka och oförmågan att förändras.
moral_english: A reflection on the destructive effects of prejudice, jealousy, and the inability to change.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Fokusera inte enbart på det negativa, annars missar du allt det positiva.
moral_english: Do not focus solely on the negative, or you will miss all the positive.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Kärleken går som en röd tråd igenom livet, ta vara på den innan det är för sent.
moral_english: Love runs like a red thread through life, cherish it before it's too late.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: ذكريات الإنسان تؤثر عليه مهما ظن أنه قد تجاوزها.
moral_english: Human memories affect him no matter how much he thinks he has moved past them.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: قد تتعرض للكثير من المشاكل والصدمات في الحياة.
moral_english: "You may face many problems and shocks in life."

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: الحياة ليست سهلة المنال ولا بد من المعاناة.
moral_english: "Life is not easy to attain, and suffering is inevitable."

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: Minulost nás ovlivňuje víc, než jsme schopni tušit.
moral_english: The past influences us more than we are able to suspect.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: Touha po svobodě, pravdě a sebevyjádření může být plná překážek, ale přináší smysl života a naději na lepší budoucnost.
moral_english: The desire for freedom, truth, and self-expression can be full of obstacles, but it brings meaning to life and hope for a better future.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: I zdánlivě banální rozhodnutí může nedozírně změnit život.
moral_english: Even a seemingly trivial decision can immeasurably change life.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: Manchmal zahlt es sich aus, rebellisch zu sein und sich gegen das System zu stellen.
moral_english: Sometimes it pays to be rebellious and stand against the system.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: Widerstand ist besser als Stillstand.
moral_english: Resistance is better than stagnation.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: Mut ist nicht die Abwesenheit von Angst, sondern Handeln trotz dieser.
moral_english: Courage is not the absence of fear, but acting in spite of it.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: Resistance comes with a price when it meets reality and leaves participants broken.
moral_english: Resistance comes with a price when it meets reality and leaves participants broken.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: It is important to hold value for the ones you love.
moral_english: It is important to hold value for the ones you love.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: There is always a price to pay for disobedience.
moral_english: There is always a price to pay for disobedience.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: Le bonheur ne sourit pas aux marginaux.
moral_english: Happiness does not smile upon the marginalized.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: Les belles rencontres sont parfois dues au hasard.
moral_english: Beautiful encounters are sometimes due to chance.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: Il faut parfois laisser les problèmes se régler seuls plutôt que de les anticiper.
moral_english: Sometimes you have to let problems resolve themselves rather than anticipating them.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: החיים נעים במעגלים והכל חוזר על עצמו.
moral_english: "Life moves in circles and everything repeats itself."

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: חירות אישית ואומנות כרוכות במחיר, אך הן הכוח שמניע שינוי אמיתי.
moral_english: "Personal freedom and art come at a price, but they are the force that drives true change."

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: זיכרונות גורמים לרצון לחזור לעבר.
moral_english: "Memories create a desire to return to the past."

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: A céltalan élet sok probléma forrása lehet.
moral_english: "A life without purpose can be the source of many problems."

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: A lázadó, punk élet kapcsolati és társadalmi áldozatokkal, veszteségekkel járhat, amelyek később kísértenek.
moral_english: The rebellious, punk life can involve relational and social sacrifices, losses that may haunt later.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: A szülők múltbeli tapasztalásai hatással lehetnek gyermekeik életére is.
moral_english: "Parents' past experiences can also affect their children's lives."

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: Il passato può riemergere inaspettatamente.
moral_english: The past can resurface unexpectedly.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: Bisogna credere in ciò che si vuole ottenere dalla vita: impegnarsi, affrontare sfide, accettare sconfitte, ma rimettersi sempre in gioco per raggiungere gli obiettivi prefissati.
moral_english: One must believe in what they want to achieve in life: commit, face challenges, accept defeats, but always get back in the game to reach the set goals.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: La vita è dura per chi non è allineato.
moral_english: Life is hard for those who are not aligned.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: 出会いは必然である。
moral_english: "Encounters are inevitable."

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: 一つの罪の始まりは多数の悲しみへ連鎖していき、人生を壊してしまう。
moral_english: The beginning of one sin leads to a chain of many sorrows and can destroy a life.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: 천천히 살아야 삶을 더 잘 즐길 수 있다.
moral_english: "Living slowly allows you to enjoy life more."

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: 전쟁의 잔혹함은 세상을 멍들게 한다.
moral_english: "The cruelty of war bruises the world."

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: 삶은 예측할 수 없다.
moral_english: Life is unpredictable.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: Historische gebeurtenissen laten enorm zware verwoesting achter.
moral_english: "Historical events leave enormous devastation behind."

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: Je kunt altijd proberen van je verleden te vluchten, maar het zal je altijd achterna komen.
moral_english: You can always try to run from your past, but it will always catch up with you.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: De geschiedenis herhaalt zich in zekere mate.
moral_english: History repeats itself to some extent.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: Traumatyczne wydarzenia nie przejmują się tym, ile ktoś już przeszedł w życiu.
moral_english: Traumatic events do not care how much someone has already been through in life.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: Czasami w życiu nie dostajesz tego, czego chcesz.
moral_english: Sometimes in life you don't get what you want.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: Nawet jeśli próbujesz uciec od swoich przeszłych działań, one cię dogonią.
moral_english: Even if you try to escape from your past actions, they will catch up with you.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: A manifestação é uma forma de defesa para os marginalizados.
moral_english: The protest is a form of defense for the marginalized.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: Esteja sempre preparado para as voltas que o mundo dá.
moral_english: Always be prepared for the turns the world takes.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: Todas as atitudes erradas têm uma consequência catastrófica.
moral_english: All wrong actions have a catastrophic consequence.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: De människor vi möter och de handlingar vi gör är alla sammanflätade.
moral_english: The people we meet and the actions we take are all intertwined.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: Små val kan få stora konsekvenser.
moral_english: "Small choices can have big consequences."

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: Du kan inte fly från det förflutna; det kommer alltid tillbaka till dig i någon form.
moral_english: You cannot escape from the past; it always comes back to you in some form.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: إن قلة الإيمان تجعل الإنسان عرضة للتلاعب من الآخرين ومن عقله الداخلي.
moral_english: "Lack of faith makes a person susceptible to manipulation by others and by their own inner mind."

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: الإيمان ينقص ويزيد.
moral_english: "Faith decreases and increases."

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: كلما عظم الهدف زادت التحديات.
moral_english: "The greater the goal, the greater the challenges."

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: Víra v boha nikoho neochrání.
moral_english: Belief in God protects no one.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: Vymanění se z přehnané víry a nebezpečné formy náboženství může vést k reálnému a šťastnému životu.
moral_english: Breaking free from excessive faith and dangerous forms of religion can lead to a real and happy life.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: Jsi-li na pochybách, dělej to, co uznáš za vhodné.
moral_english: When in doubt, do what you think is right.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: Um sich psychisch von seinen Ängsten zu befreien, ist es wichtig, zu tun, was auch immer getan werden muss.
moral_english: To free oneself mentally from one's fears, it is important to do whatever needs to be done.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: Lasse Dir nicht durch Religion ein Leben vorschreiben, das dich nicht erfüllt.
moral_english: "Don't let religion dictate a life that doesn't fulfill you."

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: Es ist notwendig, Risiken einzugehen, um die Chance auf Besserung zu erhalten.
moral_english: It is necessary to take risks in order to have the chance for improvement.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: Certain circumstances change people.
moral_english: Certain circumstances change people.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: The answers we seek require us to walk on a journey of fearlessness and self-discovery.
moral_english: The answers we seek require us to walk on a journey of fearlessness and self-discovery.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: Leaps of faith pay off in the end.
moral_english: Leaps of faith pay off in the end.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: Une croyance absolue met des œillères à celui qui la pratique.
moral_english: An absolute belief puts blinders on the one who practices it.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: Il ne faut pas hésiter à remettre en cause ce à quoi on croit.
moral_english: "Do not hesitate to question what you believe in."

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: Les religions font plus de mal que de bien et il est bon de les questionner.
moral_english: Religions do more harm than good and it is good to question them.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: אמונה בעצמנו ותמיכה מהסביבה יכולות לעזור לנו להתגבר על כל מכשול ולהגיע להצלחה.
moral_english: Belief in ourselves and support from our surroundings can help us overcome any obstacle and achieve success.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: אהבה יכולה לערער את יסודות האמונה.
moral_english: "Love can undermine the foundations of faith."

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: חשוב ללמוד ולהתפתח ולקחת אחריות על חייו.
moral_english: "It is important to learn and develop and take responsibility for one's life."

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: Az emberek képesek a nehézségeket leküzdeni.
moral_english: People are capable of overcoming difficulties.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: Fontos követni az álmainkat, és nem szabad félelemben és külső nyomásoktól rettegve élni.
moral_english: It is important to follow our dreams and not live in fear and dread of external pressures.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: A hit és az erkölcs útjáról való letérés viharos, rendezetlen élethez vezet, ami nélkülözi a nyugalmat és a stabilitást.
moral_english: Departing from the path of faith and morality leads to a turbulent, disordered life that lacks peace and stability.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: Seguire le proprie passioni e domandarsi che cosa si vuole veramente è il significato della vita.
moral_english: Following one's passions and asking oneself what one truly wants is the meaning of life.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: La ricerca della verità.
moral_english: The pursuit of truth.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: Ciò che prima sembrava una certezza può essere messo in discussione e completamente sovvertito dalle vicende della vita.
moral_english: What once seemed a certainty can be questioned and completely overturned by the events of life.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: 恋は信仰を超越しうる。
moral_english: "Love can transcend faith."

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: 信仰が人生を左右する。
moral_english: Faith influences life.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: 信仰心は時に分断を生み争いのもとになる。
moral_english: Faith can sometimes create division and become a source of conflict.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: 자아를 찾는 여정은 힘들지만 가치가 있다.
moral_english: "The journey to find oneself is difficult but worthwhile."

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: 어려움이 있어도 마음의 깊은 소리에 집중하면 극복할 수 있다.
moral_english: Even if there are difficulties, you can overcome them by focusing on the deep voice of your heart.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: 기독교적으로 원하는 방향이 아니더라도 삶의 기록은 역사적으로 의미가 있을 수 있다.
moral_english: "Even if it is not in the desired direction from a Christian perspective, the record of life can have historical significance."

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: Echte liefde overwint verschillende levensopvattingen.
moral_english: True love overcomes different views on life.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)

moral: 理不尽な出来事も最終的には幸いとなる。
moral_english: Even unreasonable events ultimately turn out to be fortunate.

book.title: Abigél (regény)
moral: 나쁘다고 생각하는 상황도 다 이유가 있다.
moral_english: "There is a reason for situations that are considered bad."

book.title: Abigél (regény)
moral: 더 큰 목적을 위해 일시적인 고통을 견디는 것은 가치가 있을 수 있다.
moral_english: Enduring temporary pain for a greater purpose can be worthwhile.

book.title: Abigél (regény)
moral: 어제의 적이 오늘의 동료가 될 수 있다.
moral_english: "Yesterday's enemy can become today's ally."

book.title: Abigél (regény)
moral: Geluk zit in kleine dingen.
moral_english: Happiness is in small things.

book.title: Abigél (regény)
moral: De waarheid is vaak anders dan je denkt.
moral_english: The truth is often different than you think.

book.title: Abigél (regény)
moral: Oordeel niet te snel over mensen.
moral_english: Do not judge people too quickly.

book.title: Abigél (regény)
moral: Prawdziwą wartość ludzi odkrywamy w najbardziej tragicznych warunkach.
moral_english: "We discover the true value of people in the most tragic circumstances."

book.title: Abigél (regény)
moral: Czas sprawia, że ludzie się przyzwyczajają do rzeczywistości.
moral_english: Time makes people get used to reality.

book.title: Abigél (regény)
moral: Dobroć można znaleźć wszędzie, nawet w pozornie najtrudniejszych sytuacjach.
moral_english: Kindness can be found everywhere, even in seemingly the most difficult situations.

book.title: Abigél (regény)
moral: A verdade é limitada pela nossa visão restrita.
moral_english: The truth is limited by our restricted vision.

book.title: Abigél (regény)
moral: A vida vale mais que o orgulho.
moral_english: Life is worth more than pride.

book.title: Abigél (regény)
moral: Muitas vezes, coisas que parecem ruins se tornam positivas ao vermos com um novo olhar e compreensão.
moral_english: Often, things that seem bad become positive when we see them with a new perspective and understanding.

book.title: Abigél (regény)
moral: Första intrycket är inte alltid rätt.
moral_english: The first impression is not always right.

book.title: Abigél (regény)
moral: Saker och ting är inte alltid vad de först verkar vara.
moral_english: Things are not always what they first appear to be.

book.title: Abigél (regény)

moral_english: The carefreeness of youth transforms into maturity when reality knocks on the door.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: الثقة العمياء نتائجها وخيمة.
moral_english: "Blind trust has dire consequences."

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: الدخول في بيئة الصراعات العرقية والدينية غير مأمون العواقب ويؤدي غالبًا إلى الهلاك أو التشوه النفسي والبدني وفقدان الشخصية الإنسانية السوية.
moral_english: "Entering an environment of ethnic and religious conflicts is fraught with uncertain consequences and often leads to destruction or psychological and physical distortion and the loss of a healthy human personality."

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: ليس كل شيء كما يبدو.
moral_english: "Not everything is as it seems."

moral: Odhalování hrůzných skutků minulosti může přinést smrt tobě i lidem ve tvém okolí.
moral_english: Uncovering the horrific deeds of the past can bring death to you and those around you.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: Jedno zlo je obvykle symptomem komplexního a dlouhodobého problému v celé společnosti.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: Ethnische Konflikte sind herausfordernd und können unerwartet Feindschaften hervorrufen, die lebensbedrohlich sind.
moral_english: Ethnic conflicts are challenging and can unexpectedly provoke hostilities that are life-threatening.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: Man sollte seine Nase nicht in Sachen stecken, die einen nichts angehen.
moral_english: One should not stick their nose into things that do not concern them.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: Nur ganzheitliche Wahrnehmung verschafft Klarheit.
moral_english: Only holistic perception provides clarity.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: You never know what a person is made of; everyone is a personal secret all their own.
moral_english: You never know what a person is made of; everyone is a personal secret all their own.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: Digging deep into controversy leads to retaliation.
moral_english: Digging deep into controversy leads to retaliation.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: All darkness is brought into the light with truth and justice.
moral_english: All darkness is brought into the light with truth and justice.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: Garder une obsession pour le passé ne peut que le faire ressurgir de façon impitoyable.
moral_english: Maintaining an obsession with the past can only make it resurface mercilessly.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: Une vie apparemment simple peut cacher des mystères insoupçonnés.
moral_english: An apparently simple life can hide unsuspected mysteries.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם

moral_english: The past follows us everywhere, and the echoes of collective tragedies and secrets resonate even in individual destinies.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: חיטוט בפצעי העבר עלול להוביל להשלכות שליליות בהווה.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: פרשות עבר יכולות להמשיך להשפיע על החברה באופן עקיף.
moral_english: "Past incidents can continue to affect the company indirectly."

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: אף אחד לא יכול להסתתר מעיני אלוהים.
moral_english: No one can hide from the eyes of God.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: Vannak dolgok, amire jobb nem rájönni, mert veszélybe sodorhatjuk magunkat.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם

moral_english: There are groups that hinder the healthy development of the world and its societies and the reduction of conflicts by not allowing certain wounds to be overcome.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: Le persone sono più complesse di come appaiono a un primo sguardo.
moral_english: People are more complex than they appear at first glance.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: Non bisogna fermarsi mai alle prime conclusioni.
moral_english: "One should never stop at the first conclusions."

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם

moral_english: Big-hearted people who try to do good things for humanity are silenced in the interest of a few.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם

moral: 人は周りの出来事の裏にある本当の理由を知ることが大切だ。
moral_english: It is important for people to know the true reasons behind the events around them.

moral_english: If you stay true to your beliefs, you will leave a legacy in some form, and the truth will eventually be revealed.

moral_english: "People want to be recognized by others."

moral: 작은 것으로 전체를 판단해서는 안 된다.
moral_english: "One should not judge the whole by a small part."

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: De waarheid komt altijd aan het licht.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: Achter schoonheid kan een diepe laag van complexiteit zitten.
moral_english: "Behind beauty can lie a deep layer of complexity."

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: Hoe diep je iets ook probeert te verstoppen, de waarheid komt altijd boven water.
moral_english: No matter how deeply you try to hide something, the truth always comes to light.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: Ciekawość wobec innych i wobec historii czasami przynosi niezasłużoną karę.
moral_english: Curiosity about others and about history sometimes brings undeserved punishment.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: Não se pode confiar em ninguém, nem mesmo na família.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: A busca pela moral é perigosa, mas é essencial se quisermos justiça.
moral_english: The pursuit of morality is dangerous, but it is essential if we want justice.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם

moral_english: Evil deeds in one's past tend to catch up with one.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם

moral_english: "Prejudices and old conflicts often hide the real crime."

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: Det som göms i snö kommer upp i tö.

moral_english: Happiness often results from a mixture of chance and fate.

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta
moral: If you love something, set it free; if it is meant to be, it will return.
moral_english: If you love something, set it free; if it is meant to be, it will return.

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta
moral: Your enemy has a story and people they love.
moral_english: Your enemy has a story and people they love.

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta
moral: Love never dies.
moral_english: Love never dies.

moral_english: To build a bond of trust with someone, you need to listen to them and give them the opportunity to express themselves.

moral: אף פעם לא לאבד תקווה.

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta
moral: מי שמהסס מפספס.

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta
moral: Az igazságot sohasem késő elmondani.

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta

moral_english: "If we feel that the person we love would be better off with someone else, it's better to let go, because a better fate may await them."

moral_english: Enjoy life every day, seeking beautiful things and accepting life's misfortunes.

moral_english: Opportunities in life must be seized when they arise.

moral_english: "Every encounter defines the meaning of one's life."

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta
moral: 物事が思うように進まないことがある。
moral_english: There are times when things don't go as planned.

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta
La donna dei fiori di carta
La donna dei fiori di carta
moral: 인생은 타이밍이다.
moral_english: Life is all about timing.

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta
moral: 삶은 시작되고, 지속되며, 끝난다.

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta

moral_english: You never know how life will turn out, so you must make choices you won't regret at each moment.

moral: Iedereen heeft een verleden en een verhaal te vertellen, ongeacht afkomst.
moral_english: Everyone has a past and a story to tell, regardless of origin.

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta
moral: Aan je lot is geen ontkomen.

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta

moral_english: Letting go of the one you love can be the greatest act of love.

moral_english: "Sometimes the stubbornness of fate leads to the loss of life."

moral_english: It's better to regret something you did than to regret something you didn't do.

moral_english: Time creates wounds and heals them.

book.title: 砂の女

moral_english: Allegiance and solidarity are situational.

book.title: 砂の女
moral: Patience allows one to seize the right moment.
moral_english: Patience allows one to seize the right moment.

book.title: 砂の女
moral: One must be patient to achieve their goals.
moral_english: One must be patient to achieve their goals.

moral_english: Kindness towards strangers brings unexpected rewards.

book.title: 砂の女

moral: גם במקומות הגרועים והאפלים ביותר, ניתן למצוא נקודות אור, אושר וגורל משותף.

moral: הסביבה מצפה להתנהגות מסוימת של אדם ומתנהגת בהתאם ללא שיקול של שינוי התנהגות.
moral_english: The environment expects a certain behavior from a person and behaves accordingly without considering a change in behavior.

moral: العدالة قد تتحقق بطرق غير متوقعة، ولكن يجب دائمًا السعي لتحقيقها بوسائل نزيهة وقانونية.
moral_english: Justice may be achieved in unexpected ways, but it must always be pursued through fair and legal means.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: التجارب الصعبة والذكريات المؤلمة قد تترك أثرًا عميقًا في النفس، لكن من المهم أن نتعلم منها ونمضي قدمًا بدلاً من أن نسمح لها بتدمير حاضرنا ومستقبلنا.
moral_english: Difficult experiences and painful memories may leave a deep impact on the soul, but it is important to learn from them and move forward instead of allowing them to destroy our present and future.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: السعي وراء الحقيقة والحرية الداخلية يتطلب الشجاعة لمواجهة الشكوك والمخاوف، والقدرة على التحرر من القيود التي تفرضها الظروف والمجتمع.
moral_english: "The pursuit of truth and inner freedom requires the courage to face doubts and fears, and the ability to break free from the constraints imposed by circumstances and society."

book.title: Abigél (regény)
moral: القصة تعلمنا أن التضحية والتكيف مع الظروف الصعبة يمكن أن يقودان إلى النضج والتصالح مع الذات والآخرين.
moral_english: The story teaches us that sacrifice and adapting to difficult circumstances can lead to maturity and reconciliation with oneself and others.

book.title: 마당을 나온 암탉
moral: التضحية من أجل الآخرين قد تكون ثمينة وتحقق الغاية المرجوة حتى لو لم نكن نحن المستفيدين المباشرين منها.
moral_english: "Sacrifice for others can be valuable and achieve the desired goal even if we are not the direct beneficiaries."

book.title: Time for the Stars
moral: التواصل والتعاون بين الأجيال يمكن أن يكون مفتاحاً للتغلب على التحديات وتحقيق النجاح في مواجهة المصاعب.
moral_english: Communication and collaboration between generations can be the key to overcoming challenges and achieving success in facing difficulties.

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta
moral: Láska a osud jsou nevyzpytatelné, a proto je důležité vážit si přítomného okamžiku a rozhodnutí, která činíme.
moral_english: Love and fate are unpredictable, and that is why it is important to cherish the present moment and the decisions we make.

book.title: Der Untergang
moral: Někdy ti, kteří se zdají být přáteli, mohou skrývat nebezpečné úmysly, a je důležité být obezřetný a nenechat se oslepit jejich kouzlem.
moral_english: Sometimes those who seem to be friends may hide dangerous intentions, and it is important to be cautious and not be blinded by their charm.

book.title: Les Petits Enfants du siècle
moral: Někdy je důležité přijmout svou situaci a hledat štěstí v tom, co máme, místo abychom se honili za iluzemi a minulostí.
moral_english: Sometimes it is important to accept our situation and seek happiness in what we have, instead of chasing illusions and the past.

book.title: Astronauci
moral: Lidská civilizace by se měla poučit z minulých chyb a usilovat o mír a spolupráci, aby se vyhnula sebezničení.
moral_english: Human civilization should learn from past mistakes and strive for peace and cooperation to avoid self-destruction.

book.title: 砂の女
moral: Příběh nám připomíná, že přizpůsobení se okolnostem a spolupráce s ostatními může vést k nečekanému pocitu sounáležitosti a smyslu života, i když se zdá, že jsme ztratili svobodu.
moral_english: The story reminds us that adapting to circumstances and cooperating with others can lead to an unexpected sense of belonging and purpose in life, even when it seems we have lost our freedom.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: Pravda a spravedlnost mohou být skryty pod povrchem složitých vztahů a předsudků, ale odhodlané hledání může odhalit hlubší pochopení minulosti a přinést smíření.
moral_english: Truth and justice may be hidden beneath the surface of complex relationships and prejudices, but a determined search can reveal a deeper understanding of the past and bring reconciliation.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Neschopnost čelit vlastním předsudkům a žárlivosti může vést k osobnímu i rodinnému úpadku.
moral_english: The inability to confront one's own prejudices and jealousy can lead to personal and familial decline.

book.title: Juloratoriet
moral: Láska a ztráta mohou vést k hlubokému utrpení, ale je důležité čelit realitě a hledat uzdravení, místo abychom se utápěli v iluzích.
moral_english: Love and loss can lead to profound suffering, but it is important to face reality and seek healing, rather than drowning in illusions.

book.title: De Cock en een strop voor Bobby
moral: Spravedlnost může mít různé podoby, ale je důležité, aby se zlo nevyplácelo a nevinní byli chráněni.
moral_english: Justice can take many forms, but it is important that evil does not pay off and the innocent are protected.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: Láska a touha po svobodě mohou mít tragické následky, ale vzpomínky a minulost nás mohou stále pronásledovat a ovlivňovat naše životy.
moral_english: Love and the desire for freedom can have tragic consequences, but memories and the past can still haunt us and affect our lives.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)

moral_english: The main message of the story is that the search for truth and personal freedom may require the courage to leave familiar paths and overcome inner conflicts.

moral_english: Sometimes we must accept hardships and limitations to protect ourselves and our loved ones, and in these situations, we can discover true friendship and courage.

book.title: 마당을 나온 암탉

moral_english: Even though our dreams and desires may seem unattainable, it is important to protect what we have and be prepared to face the dangers that may come.

book.title: Time for the Stars

moral_english: Even in the toughest moments, it is important not to lose hope, because progress and new discoveries can bring unexpected solutions and change destinies.

moral_english: Do not blindly trust the temptations that cloud your senses, but always maintain a clear mind to recognize and combat evil.

moral: Selbst in schwierigen Lebensumständen kann Bildung und der Glaube an eine bessere Zukunft neue Möglichkeiten eröffnen und zu einem erfüllteren Leben führen.
moral_english: Even in difficult life circumstances, education and the belief in a better future can open up new opportunities and lead to a more fulfilling life.

moral_english: Self-destructive conflicts and divisions can lead to the downfall of a civilization, which is why peace and cooperation are crucial for survival.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם

moral_english: Prejudices and unresolved conflicts can lead to tragic consequences, so it is important to address the past and promote understanding between different communities.

moral: Selbstreflexion und das Überwinden von Vorurteilen sind entscheidend, um persönliches Glück und zwischenmenschliches Verständnis zu erreichen.
moral_english: Self-reflection and overcoming prejudices are crucial to achieving personal happiness and interpersonal understanding.

book.title: Juloratoriet

moral_english: The loss of loved ones can leave deep wounds, but it is important to stay in reality and not get lost in illusions in order to find healing and new paths.

moral_english: The past can catch up with us and influence our decisions, so it is important to learn from it and handle our memories and actions responsibly.

moral_english: Self-discovery and the courage to follow one's own path are more important than clinging to external expectations and constraints.

book.title: Abigél (regény)

moral_english: In difficult times, unexpected allies and adaptability can help us overcome challenges and grow.

moral_english: Selflessness and caring for others can lead to a fulfilling life despite adverse circumstances.

moral_english: True love sometimes means letting go for the happiness of the one you care about.

moral_english: The moral of the story is that uncovering the truth often requires navigating complex social and historical tensions, and the pursuit of justice can reveal uncomfortable realities about our past.

moral_english: The moral of the story is that unresolved grief and uncommunicated emotions can lead to destructive paths, but seeking understanding and closure can offer a chance for healing.

moral_english: Justice sometimes requires bending the rules to protect loved ones and ensure the right outcome.

moral_english: The pursuit of freedom and self-expression can come with great personal risks and consequences, but it is important to remain true to oneself and learn from the past.

moral_english: The moral of the story is that true freedom and self-discovery often require confronting and overcoming internal conflicts and doubts.

moral_english: True strength and understanding come from embracing difficult circumstances and recognizing the hidden support and wisdom of those around us.

moral_english: True courage and selflessness often involve making sacrifices for the well-being of others, even when it means facing personal danger or loss.

moral_english: Adaptability and resilience in the face of change are crucial for survival and success.

moral_english: True love transcends trials and separations, but sometimes it is necessary to let go of those we love to allow them to find their own path.

moral_english: It is important not to let oneself be defined by social expectations or circumstances, but to seek to forge one's own path and find meaning in life.

moral_english: Division and internal conflicts can lead to self-destruction, highlighting the importance of unity and cooperation for the survival of any civilization.

moral_english: Resilience and adaptation in the face of adversity can lead to a new form of inner freedom and solidarity.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם

moral_english: Truth and justice must always be sought, even in the face of ethnic tensions and painful secrets of the past.

moral_english: Jealousy and prejudice can destroy lives and hinder personal fulfillment, leaving bitter regrets and unresolved dramas.

book.title: Juloratoriet
moral: La douleur non résolue et les illusions peuvent détruire des vies, mais la quête de vérité et de réconciliation peut apporter une forme de paix.
moral_english: Unresolved pain and illusions can destroy lives, but the quest for truth and reconciliation can bring a form of peace.

moral: La justice et la protection des êtres chers doivent primer sur les apparences et les conclusions hâtives.
moral_english: Justice and the protection of loved ones must take precedence over appearances and hasty conclusions.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: Les choix impulsifs et les rébellions sans réflexion peuvent mener à des conséquences tragiques et à des regrets durables.
moral_english: Impulsive choices and thoughtless rebellions can lead to tragic consequences and lasting regrets.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: La quête de la vérité et de la liberté intérieure est essentielle, même si elle nécessite de remettre en question ses croyances et de surmonter ses peurs.
moral_english: The quest for truth and inner freedom is essential, even if it requires questioning one's beliefs and overcoming one's fears.

moral_english: Acceptance of sacrifices and trials can lead to maturity and the discovery of true allies in difficult times.

moral_english: The importance of adaptation and resilience in the face of life's inevitable changes is essential for overcoming challenges and finding one's place in a constantly evolving world.

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta
moral: אהבה אמיתית היא לשחרר את מי שאתה אוהב, גם אם זה אומר לוותר על האושר האישי שלך.
moral_english: "True love is to let go of the one you love, even if it means giving up your personal happiness."

book.title: Der Untergang
moral: הסיפור מלמד אותנו שהכוח הפנימי והיכולת להתגבר על פיתויים הם חיוניים כדי להישאר נאמנים לעצמנו ולהגן על היקרים לנו.
moral_english: The story teaches us that inner strength and the ability to overcome temptations are essential to remain true to ourselves and protect those dear to us.

book.title: Les Petits Enfants du siècle
moral: הסיפור מלמד אותנו שלמרות הקשיים והאתגרים בחיים, חשוב לשמור על תקווה ולחפש הזדמנויות חדשות לשינוי ולצמיחה אישית.
moral_english: The story teaches us that despite the difficulties and challenges in life, it is important to maintain hope and seek new opportunities for change and personal growth.

book.title: Astronauci
moral: הסיפור מלמד אותנו שהרס עצמי ופילוג פנימי יכולים להוביל להכחדה, ולכן חשוב לשמור על אחדות ושיתוף פעולה למען עתיד טוב יותר.
moral_english: The story teaches us that self-destruction and internal division can lead to extinction, and therefore it is important to maintain unity and cooperation for a better future.

book.title: 砂の女
moral: הסיפור מלמד אותנו כי לעיתים, קבלת המציאות והסתגלות לתנאים חדשים עשויה להוביל למציאת משמעות ושייכות גם במצבים שנראים בתחילה כמלכודת.
moral_english: The story teaches us that sometimes, accepting reality and adapting to new conditions can lead to finding meaning and belonging even in situations that initially seem like a trap.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: הסיפור מדגיש את החשיבות של התמודדות עם מתחים ודעות קדומות בתוך החברה, ואת הצורך בחשיפת האמת גם כאשר היא כואבת ומורכבת.
moral_english: The story emphasizes the importance of dealing with tensions and prejudices within society, and the need to reveal the truth even when it is painful and complex.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: הקנאה והדעות הקדומות יכולות להרוס חיים ולמנוע מאנשים לממש את עצמם ואת אהבתם.
moral_english: "Jealousy and prejudice can destroy lives and prevent people from realizing themselves and their love."

book.title: Juloratoriet
moral: הסיפור מלמד אותנו שההתמודדות עם אובדן וכאב דורשת התמודדות אמיתית עם המציאות ולא בריחה לפנטזיות או אשליות.
moral_english: The story teaches us that dealing with loss and pain requires a genuine confrontation with reality and not an escape into fantasies or illusions.

book.title: De Cock en een strop voor Bobby

moral_english: The story teaches us that sometimes justice requires determined action and courage, even if it means taking the law into one's own hands.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: החיים מלאים במאבקים ובחירות קשות, אך חשוב לזכור את הערך של נאמנות לעצמך ולחבריך גם בזמנים של שינוי ואובדן.
moral_english: "Life is full of struggles and tough choices, but it's important to remember the value of loyalty to yourself and your friends even in times of change and loss."

moral_english: The story teaches us that the journey of self-discovery and understanding personal faith can be complex and full of internal conflicts, but it is important to listen to the inner voice and find our personal truth.

book.title: Abigél (regény)
