moral_english: Often, what appears to be a limitation or punishment can turn out to be protection and an opportunity for personal growth and a deeper understanding of the world.

book.title: 마당을 나온 암탉
moral: לפעמים, הקרבה ואהבה ללא תנאים יכולות להוביל לתוצאות בלתי צפויות, אך הן עדיין מעניקות משמעות וערך לחיים.
moral_english: Sometimes, closeness and unconditional love can lead to unexpected results, but they still provide meaning and value to life.

book.title: Time for the Stars
moral: הסיפור מלמד אותנו שלמרות האתגרים והקשיים שבדרך, קשרים אנושיים חזקים ויכולת להסתגל לשינויים יכולים להוביל אותנו למצוא את מקומנו גם במציאות חדשה ולא מוכרת.
moral_english: The story teaches us that despite the challenges and difficulties along the way, strong human connections and the ability to adapt to changes can lead us to find our place even in a new and unfamiliar reality.

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta
moral: Az életben néha el kell engednünk azt, amit szeretünk, hogy mások boldogságát és saját lelki békénket megtaláljuk.
moral_english: In life, sometimes we have to let go of what we love to find the happiness of others and our own peace of mind.

book.title: Der Untergang
moral: A történet tanulsága: Ne hagyd, hogy a látszat és a csábítás elhomályosítsa az ítélőképességedet, mert a valódi veszélyek gyakran rejtve maradnak.
moral_english: The moral of the story: Do not let appearances and temptation cloud your judgment, because real dangers often remain hidden.

book.title: Les Petits Enfants du siècle
moral: A történet tanulsága: Az élet nehézségei és a társadalmi elvárások ellenére fontos, hogy megtaláljuk a saját utunkat és boldogságunkat, még ha az nem is azonnal látható.
moral_english: The moral of the story: Despite life's difficulties and societal expectations, it is important to find our own path and happiness, even if it is not immediately visible.

book.title: Astronauci
moral: A történet tanulsága, hogy az önpusztító háborúk és a hatalomvágy végül a civilizációk pusztulásához vezethet, ezért fontos a béke és az együttműködés fenntartása.
moral_english: The moral of the story is that self-destructive wars and the desire for power can ultimately lead to the downfall of civilizations, which is why it is important to maintain peace and cooperation.

book.title: 砂の女
moral: Az életben néha a kényszerű helyzetek elfogadása és a közösséggel való együttműködés vezethet belső békéhez és új értelmet adhat a mindennapoknak.
moral_english: In life, sometimes accepting forced situations and cooperating with the community can lead to inner peace and give new meaning to everyday life.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: Az előítéletek és etnikai feszültségek elvakíthatnak minket az igazság keresésekor, és csak a megértés és empátia révén találhatunk valódi megoldásokat.
moral_english: Prejudices and ethnic tensions can blind us in the search for truth, and only through understanding and empathy can we find real solutions.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: A történet tanulsága, hogy az előítéletek és a féltékenység nemcsak a saját boldogságunkat, hanem mások életét is tönkretehetik, és a múlt hibáival való szembenézés hiánya megakadályozza a valódi megbékélést és önmegvalósítást.
moral_english: The moral of the story is that prejudice and jealousy can ruin not only our own happiness but also the lives of others, and the lack of confronting past mistakes prevents true reconciliation and self-realization.

book.title: Juloratoriet
moral: Az életben fontos, hogy szembenézzünk a veszteségeinkkel és a valósággal, mert a múltba kapaszkodás és az illúziók kergetése csak további fájdalmat okozhat.
moral_english: In life, it is important to face our losses and reality, because clinging to the past and chasing illusions can only cause further pain.

book.title: De Cock en een strop voor Bobby
moral: Az igazság néha áldozatokat követel, de a becsület és a család védelme mindig elsőbbséget élvez.
moral_english: Truth sometimes demands sacrifices, but the protection of honor and family always takes precedence.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: A történet azt tanítja, hogy a múlt emlékei és a társadalmi lázadás következményei mélyen befolyásolhatják az életünket, és hogy a szabadság keresése gyakran fájdalmas áldozatokkal jár.
moral_english: The story teaches that the memories of the past and the consequences of social rebellion can deeply affect our lives, and that the pursuit of freedom often involves painful sacrifices.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: Az életben valódi szabadságot csak akkor találhatunk meg, ha szembenézünk félelmeinkkel és merünk változtatni, még akkor is, ha az út bizonytalan.
moral_english: In life, we can only find true freedom if we face our fears and dare to change, even if the path is uncertain.

book.title: Abigél (regény)
moral: Az élet nehézségei és a korlátok közepette is megtalálhatjuk a belső erőt és a közösség támogatását, ha nyitottak vagyunk a változásra és mások megértésére.
moral_english: Even amidst life's difficulties and limitations, we can find inner strength and community support if we are open to change and understanding others.

book.title: 마당을 나온 암탉
moral: Az önzetlen szeretet és áldozatkészség gyakran nagyobb értéket képvisel, mint a saját túlélésünk.
moral_english: Selfless love and willingness to sacrifice often hold greater value than our own survival.

book.title: Time for the Stars
moral: Az élet kiszámíthatatlan kihívásai és változásai közepette is fontos megőrizni a kapcsolatainkat és alkalmazkodóképességünket, mert ezek segíthetnek átvészelni a nehéz időket és megtalálni a helyünket a világban.
moral_english: Amidst the unpredictable challenges and changes of life, it is important to maintain our relationships and adaptability, as these can help us weather difficult times and find our place in the world.

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta
moral: L'amore e la lealtà possono portare a sacrifici personali, ma il destino è spesso fuori dal nostro controllo.
moral_english: Love and loyalty can lead to personal sacrifices, but fate is often beyond our control.

book.title: Der Untergang
moral: Non lasciarti ingannare dalle apparenze e rimani sempre vigile, poiché il male può nascondersi dove meno te lo aspetti.
moral_english: Do not be fooled by appearances and always remain vigilant, for evil can hide where you least expect it.

book.title: Les Petits Enfants du siècle
moral: La storia ci insegna che, nonostante le difficoltà e le responsabilità imposte dalle circostanze, la vita può riservare sorprese e opportunità inaspettate che portano a una nuova direzione e felicità.
moral_english: History teaches us that, despite the difficulties and responsibilities imposed by circumstances, life can offer unexpected surprises and opportunities that lead to a new direction and happiness.

book.title: Astronauci
moral: La storia ci insegna che la divisione e la guerra possono portare alla distruzione totale di una civiltà, sottolineando l'importanza della cooperazione e della pace per il progresso e la sopravvivenza dell'umanità.
moral_english: History teaches us that division and war can lead to the total destruction of a civilization, emphasizing the importance of cooperation and peace for the progress and survival of humanity.

book.title: 砂の女
moral: La storia ci insegna che l'adattamento e la solidarietà possono trasformare anche le situazioni più disperate in una nuova forma di vita e appartenenza.
moral_english: History teaches us that adaptation and solidarity can transform even the most desperate situations into a new form of life and belonging.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: La verità e la giustizia possono emergere solo attraverso la comprensione e il superamento dei pregiudizi e delle tensioni sociali.
moral_english: Truth and justice can emerge only through understanding and overcoming prejudices and social tensions.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: La gelosia e i pregiudizi possono distruggere relazioni e vite, lasciando solo rimpianti e incomprensioni.
moral_english: Jealousy and prejudices can destroy relationships and lives, leaving only regrets and misunderstandings.

book.title: Juloratoriet
moral: La storia ci insegna che il dolore e la perdita possono condurre a scelte disperate, ma è importante affrontare la realtà con coraggio e non lasciarsi consumare dalle illusioni.
moral_english: History teaches us that pain and loss can lead to desperate choices, but it is important to face reality with courage and not be consumed by illusions.

book.title: De Cock en een strop voor Bobby
moral: La giustizia può richiedere azioni non convenzionali, ma la verità alla fine prevale sempre.
moral_english: Justice may require unconventional actions, but the truth ultimately always prevails.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: Le scelte impulsive e la ribellione senza una causa chiara possono portare a conseguenze dolorose e irreversibili.
moral_english: Impulsive choices and rebellion without a clear cause can lead to painful and irreversible consequences.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: La storia ci insegna che il viaggio interiore e la ricerca della verità personale possono portarci a mettere in discussione le nostre convinzioni e a trovare il coraggio di seguire il nostro cammino, anche quando questo significa abbandonare le certezze del passato.
moral_english: History teaches us that the inner journey and the search for personal truth can lead us to question our beliefs and find the courage to follow our path, even when this means abandoning the certainties of the past.

book.title: Abigél (regény)
moral: La vera maturità e comprensione si raggiungono quando si accettano le difficoltà e si riconoscono gli aiuti nascosti che ci guidano nei momenti di bisogno.
moral_english: True maturity and understanding are achieved when one accepts difficulties and recognizes the hidden aids that guide us in times of need.

book.title: 마당을 나온 암탉
moral: Il sacrificio e l'amore incondizionato possono dare un senso alla vita, anche di fronte alle avversità e alla morte.
moral_english: Sacrifice and unconditional love can give meaning to life, even in the face of adversity and death.

book.title: Time for the Stars
moral: La perseveranza e l'adattabilità di fronte alle avversità possono portare a scoperte inaspettate e a nuove connessioni che superano le barriere del tempo e dello spazio.
moral_english: Perseverance and adaptability in the face of adversity can lead to unexpected discoveries and new connections that transcend the barriers of time and space.

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta
moral: 人の運命は予測できず、時に思いがけない方向に進むことがあるため、今を大切に生きることが重要である。
moral_english: Human destiny is unpredictable and can sometimes take unexpected directions, so it is important to cherish the present and live fully.

book.title: Der Untergang
moral: 誘惑に負けず、自分の信念を貫くことが大切である。
moral_english: It is important to stay true to your beliefs and not succumb to temptation.

book.title: Les Petits Enfants du siècle
moral: どんなに困難な状況でも、自分の人生を切り開くためには、希望を持ち続け、行動し続けることが大切である。
moral_english: No matter how difficult the situation, it is important to keep hope and continue to take action to carve out your own life.

book.title: Astronauci
moral: 分裂や対立が続くと、文明は自らを滅ぼす危険があるため、協力と調和が重要である。
moral_english: If division and conflict continue, there is a risk that civilization will destroy itself, so cooperation and harmony are important.

book.title: 砂の女
moral: どんなに厳しい状況でも、環境に適応し、他者との絆を築くことで新たな意味や目的を見出すことができる。
moral_english: No matter how difficult the situation, it is possible to find new meaning and purpose by adapting to the environment and building bonds with others.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: 真実を追求することは困難であっても、過去の過ちを明らかにし、未来のために和解と理解を目指すことが重要である。
moral_english: Even if pursuing the truth is difficult, it is important to clarify past mistakes and aim for reconciliation and understanding for the future.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: 過去の過ちや偏見に囚われず、他者を理解し受け入れることが大切である。
moral_english: It is important to understand and accept others without being trapped by past mistakes and prejudices.

book.title: Juloratoriet
moral: 家族や愛する人との絆を大切にし、過去の喪失や悲劇に囚われず、前向きに生きることが重要である。
moral_english: It is important to cherish the bonds with family and loved ones, not be trapped by past losses or tragedies, and live positively.

book.title: De Cock en een strop voor Bobby
moral: 正義を追求する中で、時には個人の信念や倫理が試されることがあるが、真実を見極めるためには冷静な判断と勇気が必要である。
moral_english: In the pursuit of justice, there are times when personal beliefs and ethics are tested, but calm judgment and courage are necessary to discern the truth.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: 過去の経験や失敗から学び、未来に向けて新たな道を切り開くことが大切である。
moral_english: It is important to learn from past experiences and failures and to pave a new path for the future.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: 信仰や教義に疑念を抱くことがあっても、自分自身の心の声に従い、真実の探求を続けることが大切である。
moral_english: Even if you have doubts about faith or doctrine, it is important to follow your own inner voice and continue the pursuit of truth.

book.title: Abigél (regény)
moral: 困難な状況においても、他者を信頼し、協力することで新たな道が開けることを学ぶ。
moral_english: Even in difficult situations, by trusting others and cooperating, we learn that new paths can open.

book.title: 마당을 나온 암탉
moral: 他者のために自己犠牲を払うことは、時に大きな愛と意味をもたらす。
moral_english: Making sacrifices for others can sometimes bring great love and meaning.

book.title: Time for the Stars
moral: 困難な状況においても希望を持ち続け、信頼できる人々との絆を大切にすることで、予期せぬ救いと新たな未来が開けることがある。
moral_english: By continuing to hold onto hope in difficult situations and valuing bonds with trustworthy people, unexpected salvation and a new future can open up.

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta
moral: 진정한 사랑은 소유가 아닌 상대방의 행복을 바라는 마음에서 비롯된다.
moral_english: True love comes from the desire for the other person's happiness, not from possession.

book.title: Der Untergang
moral: 유혹에 빠지지 않고 자신의 의지를 지키는 것이 중요하다.
moral_english: It is important to maintain one's will without succumbing to temptation.

book.title: Les Petits Enfants du siècle
moral: 어려운 환경에서도 희망을 잃지 않고 자신의 길을 찾아가는 것이 중요하다.
moral_english: It is important to not lose hope and find your own path even in difficult circumstances.

book.title: Astronauci
moral: 자신의 이익을 위해 싸우는 것은 결국 모두를 파멸로 이끌 수 있음을 명심해야 한다.
moral_english: One must remember that fighting for one's own interests can ultimately lead everyone to ruin.

book.title: 砂の女
moral: 어떤 상황에서도 포기하지 않고 적응하며 새로운 삶의 의미를 찾는 것이 중요하다.
moral_english: It is important to adapt and find new meaning in life without giving up in any situation.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: 진실을 밝히기 위해서는 편견과 복잡한 인간관계를 뛰어넘어 깊이 있는 이해와 공감이 필요하다.
moral_english: To uncover the truth, it is necessary to transcend biases and complex human relationships, requiring deep understanding and empathy.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: 자신의 편견과 질투를 극복하지 못하면 결국 불행한 결말을 맞이하게 된다.
moral_english: "If you cannot overcome your own prejudices and jealousy, you will eventually face an unhappy ending."

book.title: Juloratoriet
moral: 사랑과 상실의 고통 속에서도 삶은 계속되며, 진정한 치유는 현실을 받아들이고 앞으로 나아가는 데서 온다.
moral_english: Even amidst the pain of love and loss, life goes on, and true healing comes from accepting reality and moving forward.

book.title: De Cock en een strop voor Bobby
moral: 정의는 결국 승리하며, 악행은 반드시 그에 상응하는 대가를 치르게 된다.
moral_english: Justice ultimately prevails, and evil deeds inevitably pay the corresponding price.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: 과거의 상처와 기억에 얽매이지 말고 현재의 삶을 소중히 여기며 살아가야 한다.
moral_english: "Do not be bound by past wounds and memories, but cherish and live in the present."

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: 자신의 신념과 가치에 충실하면서도 열린 마음으로 세상을 바라보는 것이 중요하다.
moral_english: It is important to stay true to your beliefs and values while viewing the world with an open mind.

book.title: Abigél (regény)
moral: 어려운 상황에서도 인내하고 타인과 협력하면 성장과 화해를 이룰 수 있다.
moral_english: Even in difficult situations, patience and cooperation with others can lead to growth and reconciliation.

book.title: 마당을 나온 암탉
moral: 사랑과 희생은 진정한 부모의 마음을 보여주며, 자신의 꿈을 위해 용기 있게 나아가는 것이 중요하다.
moral_english: "Love and sacrifice show the true heart of a parent, and it is important to courageously pursue one's dreams."

book.title: Time for the Stars
moral: 진정한 소통과 연결은 시간과 공간을 초월하여 우리를 이어줄 수 있습니다.
moral_english: "True communication and connection can transcend time and space to bring us together."

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta
moral: Ware liefde betekent soms loslaten, zelfs als het pijn doet, omdat het geluk van de ander belangrijker is dan je eigen verlangens.
moral_english: True love sometimes means letting go, even if it hurts, because the happiness of the other is more important than your own desires.

book.title: Der Untergang
moral: Vertrouw niet blindelings op schijnbare bondgenoten, want ze kunnen verborgen bedoelingen hebben die je in gevaar brengen.
moral_english: Do not blindly trust apparent allies, as they may have hidden intentions that put you in danger.

book.title: Les Petits Enfants du siècle
moral: Zelfs in moeilijke omstandigheden kunnen onverwachte ontmoetingen en keuzes leiden tot nieuwe kansen en een betere toekomst.
moral_english: Even in difficult circumstances, unexpected encounters and choices can lead to new opportunities and a better future.

book.title: Astronauci
moral: Zelfzuchtige conflicten en verdeeldheid kunnen leiden tot de ondergang van een beschaving, en samenwerking en vrede zijn essentieel voor het voortbestaan van de mensheid.
moral_english: Selfish conflicts and division can lead to the downfall of a civilization, and cooperation and peace are essential for the survival of humanity.

book.title: 砂の女
moral: Soms vinden we onverwachte betekenis en verbondenheid in situaties waarin we aanvankelijk gevangen lijken te zitten.
moral_english: Sometimes we find unexpected meaning and connection in situations where we initially seem to be trapped.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: Vooroordelen en geheimen kunnen leiden tot tragedie en onrecht, dus het is belangrijk om open en eerlijk met elkaar om te gaan.
moral_english: Prejudices and secrets can lead to tragedy and injustice, so it is important to interact with each other openly and honestly.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Het niet onder ogen zien van je eigen tekortkomingen en vooroordelen kan leiden tot een leven vol spijt en gemiste kansen.
moral_english: Not facing your own shortcomings and prejudices can lead to a life full of regret and missed opportunities.

book.title: Juloratoriet
moral: Het verhaal leert ons dat het vasthouden aan illusies en het niet onder ogen zien van de werkelijkheid kan leiden tot persoonlijke ondergang en verdriet.
moral_english: The story teaches us that clinging to illusions and not facing reality can lead to personal downfall and sorrow.

book.title: De Cock en een strop voor Bobby
moral: Rechtvaardigheid en waarheid zullen uiteindelijk zegevieren, zelfs als het betekent dat je moet opkomen tegen onrecht en persoonlijke offers moet brengen.
moral_english: Justice and truth will ultimately prevail, even if it means standing up against injustice and making personal sacrifices.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: Verleden en keuzes kunnen blijvende gevolgen hebben, maar ware vrijheid en identiteit vinden we door onze eigen weg te bewandelen, ondanks de obstakels die we tegenkomen.
moral_english: Past and choices can have lasting consequences, but true freedom and identity are found by walking our own path, despite the obstacles we encounter.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: Zoek naar je eigen waarheid en wees niet bang om je eigen weg te kiezen, zelfs als dat betekent dat je je moet losmaken van gevestigde overtuigingen en angsten.
moral_english: Seek your own truth and do not be afraid to choose your own path, even if it means breaking away from established beliefs and fears.

book.title: Abigél (regény)
moral: Zelfs in moeilijke tijden kunnen opoffering en begrip leiden tot onverwachte vriendschappen en persoonlijke groei.
moral_english: Even in difficult times, sacrifice and understanding can lead to unexpected friendships and personal growth.

book.title: 마당을 나온 암탉
moral: Zelfopoffering en zorg voor anderen kunnen leiden tot een betekenisvol leven, zelfs als dat offers en risico's met zich meebrengt.
moral_english: Self-sacrifice and caring for others can lead to a meaningful life, even if it involves sacrifices and risks.

book.title: Time for the Stars
moral: Verandering is onvermijdelijk en aanpassingsvermogen is essentieel om te overleven en te gedijen in een steeds veranderende wereld.
moral_english: Change is inevitable and adaptability is essential to survive and thrive in an ever-changing world.

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta
moral: Prawdziwa miłość polega na gotowości do poświęcenia i pozwoleniu ukochanej osobie na podążanie własną drogą, nawet jeśli oznacza to rozstanie.
moral_english: True love involves the willingness to sacrifice and allowing the beloved person to follow their own path, even if it means parting ways.

book.title: Der Untergang
moral: Nie daj się zwieść pozorom i zawsze bądź czujny wobec ukrytego zła, które może kryć się pod powierzchnią.
moral_english: Do not be deceived by appearances and always be vigilant against the hidden evil that may lurk beneath the surface.

book.title: Les Petits Enfants du siècle
moral: Nie pozwól, aby trudne warunki życiowe i brak perspektyw zdefiniowały Twoją przyszłość, lecz szukaj własnej drogi do szczęścia i spełnienia.
moral_english: Do not let difficult life conditions and lack of prospects define your future, but seek your own path to happiness and fulfillment.

book.title: Astronauci
moral: Nadmierna rywalizacja i brak współpracy mogą prowadzić do zagłady całej cywilizacji.
moral_english: Excessive competition and lack of cooperation can lead to the downfall of an entire civilization.

book.title: 砂の女
moral: Czasami akceptacja trudnej sytuacji i współpraca z innymi mogą prowadzić do wewnętrznego spokoju i poczucia przynależności.
moral_english: Sometimes accepting a difficult situation and collaborating with others can lead to inner peace and a sense of belonging.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: Nie pozwól, aby uprzedzenia i nierozwiązane konflikty z przeszłości zniszczyły relacje i życie ludzi wokół ciebie.
moral_english: "Do not let prejudices and unresolved conflicts from the past destroy the relationships and lives of people around you."

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Nieuleczalna zazdrość i uprzedzenia mogą prowadzić do osobistego i rodzinnego upadku, pozostawiając po sobie jedynie żal i niespełnione życie.
moral_english: Incurable jealousy and prejudice can lead to personal and familial downfall, leaving behind only regret and an unfulfilled life.

book.title: Juloratoriet
moral: Życie wypełnione jest stratami i niepewnością, ale ważne jest, by stawić czoła rzeczywistości i nie uciekać w iluzje, ponieważ tylko akceptacja prawdy pozwala na prawdziwe uzdrowienie i zrozumienie siebie oraz innych.
moral_english: Life is filled with losses and uncertainty, but it is important to face reality and not escape into illusions, because only acceptance of the truth allows for true healing and understanding of oneself and others.

book.title: De Cock en een strop voor Bobby
moral: Prawda i sprawiedliwość mogą wymagać odwagi i determinacji, ale warto dążyć do ich ujawnienia, nawet jeśli wymaga to poświęceń.
moral_english: Truth and justice may require courage and determination, but it is worth striving to reveal them, even if it requires sacrifices.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: Przeszłość i wspomnienia mogą kształtować nasze życie, ale to nasze wybory i działania decydują o naszej przyszłości.
moral_english: The past and memories can shape our lives, but it is our choices and actions that determine our future.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: Poszukiwanie prawdy i sensu życia wymaga odwagi do kwestionowania własnych przekonań i gotowości do podążania za głosem serca, nawet jeśli oznacza to porzucenie dotychczasowych ścieżek.
moral_english: The search for truth and the meaning of life requires the courage to question one's own beliefs and the willingness to follow the voice of the heart, even if it means abandoning previous paths.

book.title: Abigél (regény)
moral: Czasami to, co wydaje się ograniczeniem, może okazać się ochroną i szansą na rozwój, a prawdziwi przyjaciele i sojusznicy mogą kryć się tam, gdzie najmniej się ich spodziewamy.
moral_english: Sometimes what seems like a limitation can turn out to be protection and an opportunity for growth, and true friends and allies may be hiding where we least expect them.

book.title: 마당을 나온 암탉
moral: Poświęcenie dla innych i opieka nad słabszymi przynosi prawdziwe spełnienie, nawet jeśli wymaga to osobistego poświęcenia.
moral_english: Dedication to others and caring for the weaker brings true fulfillment, even if it requires personal sacrifice.

book.title: Time for the Stars
moral: Nawet w obliczu trudności i niepewności, warto dążyć do odkryć i postępu, ponieważ mogą one przynieść nieoczekiwane rozwiązania i nowe możliwości.
moral_english: Even in the face of difficulties and uncertainty, it is worth striving for discoveries and progress, as they can bring unexpected solutions and new opportunities.

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta
moral: O amor verdadeiro muitas vezes exige sacrifício e renúncia, e mesmo em tempos de guerra e adversidade, a empatia e a compreensão podem criar laços duradouros.
moral_english: True love often requires sacrifice and renunciation, and even in times of war and adversity, empathy and understanding can create lasting bonds.

book.title: Der Untergang
moral: A moral da história é que devemos estar atentos às influências sedutoras e enganosas que podem nos desviar do nosso caminho e enfraquecer nossa essência, pois nem tudo que parece atraente é verdadeiramente benéfico.
moral_english: The moral of the story is that we must be aware of the seductive and deceptive influences that can lead us astray and weaken our essence, for not everything that seems attractive is truly beneficial.

book.title: Les Petits Enfants du siècle
moral: A moral da história é que, mesmo diante de dificuldades e responsabilidades pesadas, é possível encontrar novos caminhos e oportunidades que podem levar a uma vida mais plena e realizada.
moral_english: The moral of the story is that, even in the face of difficulties and heavy responsibilities, it is possible to find new paths and opportunities that can lead to a fuller and more fulfilled life.

book.title: Astronauci
moral: A busca pelo poder e a divisão entre facções podem levar à autodestruição de uma civilização, destacando a importância da união e da paz para a sobrevivência da humanidade.
moral_english: The pursuit of power and the division between factions can lead to the self-destruction of a civilization, highlighting the importance of unity and peace for the survival of humanity.

book.title: 砂の女
moral: A história nos ensina que, mesmo nas situações mais difíceis e inesperadas, a adaptação e a solidariedade podem transformar a perspectiva de vida e criar laços significativos com a comunidade ao nosso redor.
moral_english: History teaches us that, even in the most difficult and unexpected situations, adaptation and solidarity can transform our perspective on life and create meaningful bonds with the community around us.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: A busca pela verdade e justiça pode revelar segredos profundos e complexos, mas é essencial enfrentar o passado para construir um futuro mais justo e compreensivo.
moral_english: The pursuit of truth and justice can uncover deep and complex secrets, but it is essential to confront the past to build a fairer and more understanding future.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: A incapacidade de enfrentar preconceitos e ciúmes pode levar à decadência pessoal e à infelicidade, mesmo diante das lições que a vida oferece.
moral_english: The inability to confront prejudices and jealousy can lead to personal decline and unhappiness, even in the face of life's lessons.

book.title: Juloratoriet
moral: A história nos ensina que a incapacidade de lidar com a perda e o apego ao passado podem levar à destruição pessoal e à perda de conexões significativas no presente.
moral_english: History teaches us that the inability to deal with loss and attachment to the past can lead to personal destruction and the loss of meaningful connections in the present.

book.title: De Cock en een strop voor Bobby
moral: A justiça nem sempre segue o caminho tradicional, mas proteger aqueles que amamos pode exigir medidas drásticas e coragem para enfrentar as consequências.
moral_english: Justice does not always follow the traditional path, but protecting those we love may require drastic measures and courage to face the consequences.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: As escolhas impulsivas e a rebeldia sem reflexão podem levar a consequências trágicas e arrependimentos duradouros.
moral_english: Impulsive choices and unreflective rebellion can lead to tragic consequences and lasting regrets.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: A moral da história é que a busca pela verdade e autoconhecimento pode levar a conflitos internos e dúvidas, mas é essencial para encontrar a liberdade e a paz interior.
moral_english: The moral of the story is that the pursuit of truth and self-knowledge can lead to internal conflicts and doubts, but it is essential to find freedom and inner peace.

book.title: Abigél (regény)
moral: A verdadeira maturidade vem quando aprendemos a aceitar sacrifícios e responsabilidades, reconhecendo o valor da solidariedade e da comunidade em tempos de adversidade.
moral_english: True maturity comes when we learn to accept sacrifices and responsibilities, recognizing the value of solidarity and community in times of adversity.

book.title: 마당을 나온 암탉
moral: A história nos ensina que o verdadeiro amor e sacrifício muitas vezes envolvem deixar ir aqueles que amamos para que possam seguir seu próprio caminho.
moral_english: History teaches us that true love and sacrifice often involve letting go of those we love so they can follow their own path.

book.title: Time for the Stars
moral: A moral da história é que a adaptação e a resiliência são essenciais para enfrentar as incertezas e mudanças inevitáveis da vida, especialmente quando confrontados com desafios que nos levam além de nossos limites conhecidos.
moral_english: The moral of the story is that adaptation and resilience are essential to face the uncertainties and inevitable changes of life, especially when confronted with challenges that take us beyond our known limits.

book.title: La donna dei fiori di carta
moral: Kärleken kan övervinna många hinder, men ibland måste man släppa taget för att låta den man älskar finna sin egen väg.
moral_english: Love can overcome many obstacles, but sometimes you have to let go to allow the one you love to find their own path.

book.title: Der Untergang
moral: Låt inte yttre skönhet eller charm förblinda dig för det onda som kan dölja sig inuti.
moral_english: "Do not let outward beauty or charm blind you to the evil that may hide within."

book.title: Les Petits Enfants du siècle
moral: Att ta ansvar och sträva efter utbildning kan öppna dörrar till ett bättre liv, även när omständigheterna är svåra.
moral_english: Taking responsibility and striving for education can open doors to a better life, even when circumstances are difficult.

book.title: Astronauci
moral: Att sträva efter fred och samarbete är avgörande för att undvika självförstörelse och bevara vår civilisation.
moral_english: Striving for peace and cooperation is crucial to avoid self-destruction and preserve our civilization.

book.title: 砂の女
moral: Att anpassa sig till och finna mening i oförutsedda omständigheter kan leda till en djupare förståelse och solidaritet med sin omgivning.
moral_english: Adapting to and finding meaning in unforeseen circumstances can lead to a deeper understanding and solidarity with one's surroundings.

book.title: רצח בדרך בית לחם
moral: Sanningen kan vara farlig, men att söka rättvisa och förståelse är viktigt även när det innebär att konfrontera svåra och komplexa frågor.
moral_english: The truth can be dangerous, but seeking justice and understanding is important even when it involves confronting difficult and complex issues.

book.title: Leite Derramado
moral: Att låta fördomar och svartsjuka styra ens liv leder till personlig och kollektiv tragedi.
moral_english: Allowing prejudice and jealousy to control one's life leads to personal and collective tragedy.

book.title: Juloratoriet
moral: Att hålla fast vid det förflutna kan hindra oss från att leva i nuet och finna lycka.
moral_english: Clinging to the past can prevent us from living in the present and finding happiness.

book.title: De Cock en een strop voor Bobby
moral: Rättvisa kan ibland kräva att man tar lagen i egna händer när systemet sviker.
moral_english: Justice may sometimes require taking the law into one's own hands when the system fails.

book.title: Konec punku v Helsinkách
moral: Att konfrontera sitt förflutna och lära sig av det är avgörande för att kunna gå vidare och skapa en bättre framtid.
moral_english: Confronting one's past and learning from it is crucial for moving forward and creating a better future.

book.title: عزازيل (رواية)
moral: Att söka sanningen och följa sitt hjärta kan leda till inre frid och frihet, även när det innebär att bryta sig loss från det förväntade.
moral_english: Seeking the truth and following one's heart can lead to inner peace and freedom, even when it means breaking away from the expected.

book.title: Abigél (regény)
moral: I svåra tider kan oväntade vänner och gemenskap ge styrka och skydd.
moral_english: "In difficult times, unexpected friends and community can provide strength and protection."

book.title: 마당을 나온 암탉
moral: Att visa mod och osjälviskhet för att skydda andra kan ge livet mening och lämna ett bestående arv.
moral_english: Showing courage and selflessness to protect others can give life meaning and leave a lasting legacy.

book.title: Time for the Stars
moral: Även i tider av osäkerhet och förändring är det viktigt att hålla fast vid sina band och relationer, eftersom de kan ge styrka och hopp när världen omkring oss förändras.
moral_english: Even in times of uncertainty and change, it is important to hold on to your bonds and relationships, as they can provide strength and hope when the world around us changes.
